raw_consumer_statement:
Summary : XX/XX/XXXX I Purchased medication from XXXX using American Express in the amount of {$2500.00}. 
XX/XX/XXXX - Discovered the medication was cloudy and wasnt working. I then researched the company & pharmacy to discover the product was unsterile and unsafe to use. 
XX/XX/XXXX Requested refund from XXXX ( email ) XX/XX/XXXX XXXX denied refund ( email ) XX/XX/XXXX Our First Request to OPEN DISPUTE with American Express XX/XX/XXXX - American Express denied dispute/chargeback XX/XX/XXXX Our SECOND Request for REFUND and request to REOPEN case. ( contacted American Express via Chat ) XX/XX/XXXX Provided 10 documents to American Express website to support my claim. 
XX/XX/XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX story released regarding this company and the egregious acts of XXXX XXXX. 
XX/XX/XXXX Contacted American Express to check status of dispute ( called ) XX/XX/XXXX American Express denied dispute/chargeback. 
XX/XX/XXXX Called American Express to explain that they can not close case when I have provided factual evidence to support my claim ( spoke to XXXX ). XXXX set up a conference call scheduled for XX/XX/XXXX and promised to call me at XXXX that day. 
XX/XX/XXXX XXXX from American Express did not call at XXXX as promised. Instead, after waiting 1 hour, I called American Express and spoke to XXXX XXXX who agreed to reopen the case and stated to me that They must not have read my documents and promised to read them this time. 
XX/XX/XXXX - Our THIRD Request for REFUND and request to REOPEN case. At XXXX we received a call from XXXX who said that the case was reopened and that he would personally review my information this time. 
XX/XX/XXXX Received a call from XXXX '' from American Express wondering when our documents would be uploaded. We told him that we were waiting for the American Express denial paperwork to come in the mail so we could see why/how they could possibly deny us. 
XX/XX/XXXX Uploaded 8 more supporting documents after receiving mailed American Express letter as proof to win my case. 
XX/XX/XXXX American Express denied dispute/chargeback. 
XX/XX/XXXX - Our FORTH Request for REFUND and request to REOPEN case. 
XX/XX/XXXX Called American Express and spoke to XXXX. She agreed with me that the case needed to be reopened and pointed out that XXXX so-called evidence was missing important info like signatures, etc and agreed that this case should be reconsidered. She promised to put notes in my case and reopened the case for me. Currently this case is open and in progress as I am submitting this form. 
XX/XX/XXXX Submitted official grievance against American Express with CFPB ( Consumer Financial Protection Bureau )
